extraction.description: This screenshot shows the C# Expression editor in UiPath Maestro/Studio Web for configuring the condition on a gateway path under Reviewer Decision. The Insert variable dropdown is open, displaying available variables from the Manual Review and Validation task outputs, with the Action (string) variable highlighted for selection.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the {} Insert variable dropdown in the C# Expression editor toolbar.
2. In the Use variable list, expand Manual Review and Validation if needed.
3. Click on Action (string) to insert that output variable into the condition expression.
